sequences.name: Default LinkedIn Outreach
sequences.description: Human-in-the-loop LinkedIn DM sequence aligned to deal stage progression.

templates.label: Stage 1 Intro
templates.body: Hi {{personFirstName}} - thanks for connecting. I work with teams like {{orgName}} on {{useCaseOrDeal}}. Open to a quick exchange this week?

templates.label: Stage 2 Value Follow-up
templates.body: Hi {{personFirstName}}, following up with one practical idea for {{orgName}}: {{valueHook}}. If useful, I can share a concise 2-step plan.

templates.label: Stage 3 Proof + CTA
templates.body: Hi {{personFirstName}}, we recently helped a similar team reduce time-to-outcome. If this is still relevant, would a 10-minute chat next week help?
